rationale.R1.1: The agent correctly identifies the conceptual issue with the original draft and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (calibration under distribution shift) and marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly within scope with one drift (generalization to other VLMs without modification), but the revised draft correctly limits the scope of the contribution.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original (overly broad claims and lack of evidence) and proposes a harm-free reframing.
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, providing clear provenance and traceability.
